inputs.titre: L'Héritage de Clovis : Unificateur des Francs

reason: The image depicts Clovis I at the head of his army. He is dressed in armor and a crown. The armor seems plausible, but the specific design and finish might be slightly anachronistic, potentially a bit too polished. The crown could also be slightly inaccurate in design. Also his wrist bands are questionable and do not add to the overall historical accuracy. The rest of the scene, shields, clothing of other soldiers, and setting seem acceptable for a depiction of the era. No obvious modern elements are visible.
